productDisplayName: Puma Men Faas 300 Black Sports Shoes
description: The Faas 300 from puma is a lightweight everyday trainer. Inspired by old school running trainers, these shoes look great when teamed with casual wear.UpperMesh upper with synthetic suede overlays for structure and breathable comfortForm-stripe on both sidesCushioned collar and tongue for plush comfortCentral lace-ups for snug FitMidsoleFull-length lateral groove in the midsole to reinforce stability throughout the gait cycleOrtho-Lite sock-liner for superior comfort, material regeneration, air circulation and anti-microbial functionOutsoleBioRide technology to reduce weight and improve forefoot cushioningEverTrack used in the outsole for greater durability in high-wear areasRocker shape of outsole allows for natural stride with an effortless toe-offFlex grooves built across the waffle patterned outsole to enhance flexibilityshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not store in direct sunlight
